hooks.command:
python - <<'PY'
import json, re, sys
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
command = payload.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
blocked = [r'\brm\s+-rf\b', r'\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b', r'\bgit\s+push\s+--force\b', r'\bDROP\s+TABLE\b']
if any(re.search(pattern, command, re.I) for pattern in blocked):
    print('Blocked by harness safety hook: dangerous command requires explicit human approval.', file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
PY
